summary: Classified the ten hydrated open PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected because this is a live PR inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, fix, or PR-opening action is safe or permitted from this job; all PRs should remain open for their normal maintainer/proof/review path.

actions.reason: Useful focused UI PR with proof supplied; maintainer review is the normal next step, not an inventory cleanup action.
Keep open as an independent contributor PR needing proof/review; do not close or replace from this close-only inventory job.
